name: Grab
description:
Press /g[X]/x to toggle a feature wherein you can place blocks as physics objects.

Moreover, /ghold Left click & Right click at the same time/x with both empty hands to /wgrab physics objects./x

/lTry it with a chest./x

Press /g[Q]/x to place a grabbed physics object down as a normal block. You can also slam them to the ground.
